# GroundX Studio

GroundX Studio is a document AI workspace for extraction, chat, report, and integration workflows over complex files.

## Primary routes

- [Onboarding](/onboarding): first-time sample and bring-your-own document experience.
- [Login](/auth/login): account sign-in.
- [Workspaces](/workspaces): workspace-scoped document chat and viewer experience.
- [Projects](/projects): project-scoped document chat and viewer experience.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Do not submit forms or upload documents without explicit user intent.
- Public crawler guidance lives in [robots.txt](/robots.txt).
